description: Returns a list of Cost Codes.

parameters.name: sub_job_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Sub Job

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: return cost codes that are filtered on an array of ID's. Example: filters[id]=[1,2]

parameters.name: filters[origin_id]
parameters.description: Origin ID. Returns item(s) with the specified Origin ID.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies which view (which attributes) of the resource is going to be present in the response.
